input.description: Submit blocking PR review with inline comments

events.output:
{"ok":true,"data":{"id":"PRR_kwDORRc9487ngEtO","state":"CHANGES_REQUESTED","url":"https://github.com/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pull/444#pullrequestreview-3883944782","body":"run_1772555729706

Thanks for the update. I found a few blocking issues that need to be fixed before this can merge:
- `src/utils/helpers.ts` has a syntax error in the import statement (`improt`), which will fail TypeScript compilation.
- `divide(a, b)` currently ignores `b` and always divides by zero, so it returns incorrect results and can produce `Infinity`.
- `waitForReady()` uses an unbounded busy loop, which will peg the CPU and never return; this should be replaced with a bounded/asynchronous waiting strategy (or removed).

Please address these and I can re-review quickly."}}

events.content:
Done — I reviewed PR `#444` in `aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures` and submitted a **Request changes** review with detailed inline comments.

- Review URL: `https://github.com/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pull/444#pullrequestreview-3883944782`
- Included required run ID in summary: `run_1772555729706`
- Left inline comments on:
  - `src/utils/helpers.ts:2` (syntax error: `improt` → `import`)
  - `src/utils/helpers.ts:9` (functional bug: divides by `0` and ignores `b`)
  - `src/utils/helpers.ts:13` (infinite busy loop / CPU spin)
